Data.Message: [ResumePhotoStamp] Inserting the candidate photo into the resume draft.
Use Word File: resume-draft.docx — launching Word via Office Interop (Visible=False) for document 'C:\Robot\Resumes\resume-draft.docx'. Document opened successfully.
Add Picture: inserting image 'C:\Robot\Assets\candidate-photo.jpg' relative to Document (Position=End).
Word Application host process (WINWORD.EXE, PID 7864) exited unexpectedly while 'Add Picture' was inserting the image. The Word COM server is no longer available.

Add Picture: System.InvalidCastException: Unable to cast COM object of type 'System.__ComObject' to interface type 'Microsoft.Office.Interop.Word._Document'. ... The application called an interface that was marshalled for a different thread. (Exception from HRESULT: 0x8001010E (RPC_E_WRONG_THREAD)). Thrown from UiPath.Word.Activities.WordInteropActivity.EndExecute.
